dict.string: AMEN 1.0 — Faith-centered social network
Editor
com.google
Editor
com.amenapp
AMEN uses Apple Music to play worship songs in your Church Notes.
AMEN uses motion activity to detect when you're driving so it can activate hands-free Berean Voice mode.
AMEN uses speech recognition to let you compose posts, prayers, and messages by voice.
We'll send you reminders about church service times and when you're near your saved churches
$(FEED_RANKING_URL)
$(SEARCH_SERVICE_URL)
$(YOUVERSION_API_KEY)
$(YOUTUBE_API_KEY)
$(SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID)
$(GOOGLE_VISION_API_KEY)
$(VERTEX_AI_KEY)
$(ALGOLIA_SEARCH_KEY)
AMEN needs access to your photo library to share images in posts, messages, and your profile.
AMEN uses the camera to take photos for posts, messages, and your profile picture.
AMEN uses your location to find nearby churches and faith communities.
AMEN uses your contacts to help you find friends who are already on the app. No contact information is stored on our servers.
AMEN uses the microphone to let you compose posts, prayers, and messages by voice.
AMEN adds church events and service reminders to your calendar so you never miss a moment.
AMEN creates reminders for prayer commitments, church events, and spiritual goals.
AMEN saves shared photos and church media to your photo library.
AMEN uses Face ID to keep your account secure and let you sign in quickly.
AMEN uses this to personalize your experience, show relevant content, and measure the effectiveness of our outreach. You can change this at any time in Settings.
AMEN reads your heart rate and activity to help Synaptic Studio craft prayers and reflections that match how you feel right now. No health data is stored.
AMEN may log mindfulness minutes from prayer and meditation sessions to Apple Health, helping you track your spiritual wellness alongside your physical health.
AccentColor
